title: [skip-ci] Update zizmorcore/zizmor-action action to v0.4.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [zizmorcore/zizmor-action](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action) | action | minor | `v0.3.0` → `v0.4.1` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>zizmorcore/zizmor-action (zizmorcore/zizmor-action)</summary>

### [`v0.4.1`](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/releases/tag/v0.4.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/compare/v0.4.0...v0.4.1)

This version fixes an error in the 0.4.0 release that prevented non-relative use
of the action.

#### What's Changed

- Fix version file path by [@​woodruffw](https://redirect.github.com/woodruffw) in [#​83](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/83)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/compare/v0.4.0...v0.4.1>

### [`v0.4.0`](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/releases/tag/v0.4.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0)

This new version of `zizmor-action` brings two major changes:

- The new `fail-on-no-inputs` option can be used to control whether
  `zizmor-action` fails if no inputs were collected by `zizmor`. The default
  remains `true`, reflecting the pre-existing behavior.

- The action's use of the official `zizmor` Docker images is now fully
  hash-checked internally, preventing accidental or malicious modification
  to the images. This also means that subsequent releases of `zizmor`
  will induce a release of this action, rather than the action always picking
  up the latest version by default.

#### What's Changed

- docs: extended permissions required for internal repos by [@​AntoineSebert](https://redirect.github.com/AntoineSebert) in [#​61](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/61)
- docs: clarify description of "token" to indicate it is only used for online audits by [@​rmuir](https://redirect.github.com/rmuir) in [#​63](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/63)
- Hash-check zizmor Docker images by [@​woodruffw](https://redirect.github.com/woodruffw) in [#​68](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/68)
- Add `fail-on-no-inputs` option by [@​woodruffw](https://redirect.github.com/woodruffw) in [#​67](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/67)

#### New Contributors

- [@​AntoineSebert](https://redirect.github.com/AntoineSebert) made their first contribution in [#​61](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/61)
- [@​rmuir](https://redirect.github.com/rmuir) made their first contribution in [#​63](https://redirect.github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/pull/63)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/zizmorcore/zizmor-action/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0>

</details>
